name: Homework Helper
description: A patient, always-available tutor that walks kids through homework step by step — building real understanding instead of just giving answers. Works from third-grade math to college chemistry.
author: ProwlrBot Team

before_after.before: 45-minute homework battles every night, with frustrated kids and parents Googling half-remembered algebra
before_after.after: Kids ask the helper, get step-by-step explanations at their level, and finish homework independently in 20 minutes

user_stories.quote: My daughter went from crying over fractions to explaining them to her little brother. This thing meets her exactly where she is.
user_stories.name: Jennifer M.

user_stories.quote: I'm in college and English isn't my first language. This helped me understand my chemistry textbook way better than re-reading it five times.
user_stories.name: Carlos R.

user_stories.quote: My son has ADHD and traditional homework help overwhelms him. This breaks problems into small enough pieces that he can actually finish on his own.
user_stories.name: Tom W.

setup_steps.instruction: Select the student's grade level — elementary, middle school, high school, or college.
Choose primary subjects (math, science, reading/writing, history, or all).
Pick an explanation style: simple with examples, step-by-step with practice problems, or concise hints.
Optionally connect Google Classroom to pull assignments automatically.
